scripts.dev: npm run atlas:dev-ip && concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "node scripts/wait-for-port.mjs 127.0.0.1 5000 30000 && npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:client && npm run start:server
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix server install --omit=dev && npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build
